name: Apple Butter-Oatmeal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Blend in the apple butter and egg, mixing well.
3. In a separate bowl, stir together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in the oats and coconut until evenly distributed.
6. Transfer the batter to a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until set.
8. Let cool slightly before dusting with powdered sugar, if desired.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Makes 36 bars.
